svg.title: FPGA Resource Utilization: ARM vs PicoRV32 Control Modes on PYNQ-Z2
svg.desc: Grouped bar chart comparing LUT, FF, BRAM, and DSP48 utilization percentages between ARM Mode and PicoRV32 Mode on Zynq-7020 FPGA.
svg.text: FPGA Resource Utilization: ARM vs. PicoRV32 Control (PYNQ-Z2 / Zynq-7020)
★ DSP48 at 100% in both modes — limits PAR_OB parallelism (see §5.2 future work)
